body: bart app said 4 min and then spiritually meant whenever. guy next to me just sighed like he'd been personally betrayed by software for the last ten years
the coffee shop by work added a gratitude shot to the menu and i genuinely don't know if that's satire anymore
otra mañana escuchando maletas por el Raval como si el barrio tuviera check-in. luego te dicen que exageras con el tema turístico
al metro tothom fa veure que no sua però a la L3 ja estem tots discutint amb la roba que ens hem posat
ringbahn wieder chaos und trotzdem stehen alle da als wäre das nur eine weitere Wetterlage. berlin macht aus allem ein Klima
new cafe on my block has six chairs, one fern, and the exact energy of a place that will explain itself to you if you let it
victoria line delay hit at the exact point in the morning where everyone has already decided not to be dramatic about it
paid 4.80 for a sad little coffee and the worst part is my brain did that london thing where it went oh nice not too bad
